untranslatable_reason: Broadening Pattern requires visual pattern recognition (dual expanding trend-lines) which cannot be expressed with available technical indicators. The pattern identification itself, formation end dating, and precise trend-line boundary detection are not available in the indicator set. Substituted with Bollinger Bands breakout as a mechanical proxy for price breaking outside a volatility boundary, but this does not capture the specific broadening pattern geometry described by Bulkowski.
translation_notes: Signal specifies 3-6 week formation-to-breakout window (set hold_days_max to 42 days). Used Bollinger Bands upper/lower as proxy for trend-line boundaries since explicit pattern detection is unavailable. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT (bidirectional breakout). Original signal lacks explicit exit criteria (AUTHOR_SILENT), so reversal through middle band was used as reasonable default. Author success rates and volume metrics marked AUTHOR_SILENT in source—not incorporated. This is a mechanical approximation only.
